questions.question: What is the earliest plausible timeline for AI to autonomously and reliably perform novel scientific research that leads to major discoveries without human intervention?
questions.why_it_matters: This determines the pace and nature of scientific progress and affects investments in human vs AI-driven research.
signals_to_watch: investment in autonomous AI research platforms

questions.question: Will a global internet outage caused by a coordinated cyberattack or infrastructure failure occur within the next decade with impacts lasting more than one week?
questions.why_it_matters: Such an event would disrupt economies, governance, and security worldwide, requiring major resilience planning.

questions.question: Can a new geopolitical alliance emerge within the next 5 years that significantly reshapes global power balances, displacing current dominant blocs?
questions.why_it_matters: Shifts in alliances change trade, security, and diplomatic strategies globally.
signals_to_watch: joint military exercises among emerging powers

questions.question: Will any major democracy implement binding AI-driven decision systems in governance within the next 10 years with demonstrable effects on policy outcomes?
questions.why_it_matters: This would fundamentally alter governance, accountability, and citizen participation.

questions.question: By 2030, will AI-driven automation replace more than 30% of currently human-held jobs in at least one major economy, leading to net job displacement?
questions.why_it_matters: This influences economic policy, education, and social safety nets design.

questions.question: Will a universally effective, one-dose vaccine against all influenza strains be developed and widely deployed within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: This would drastically reduce morbidity, mortality, and economic costs associated with flu epidemics.
signals_to_watch: clinical trial progress of universal vaccines

questions.question: Can direct air capture technologies achieve cost parity with fossil fuels and scale to remove at least 1 gigaton of CO2 annually by 2035?
questions.why_it_matters: This is critical for meeting climate goals and enabling negative emissions strategies.

questions.question: Will synthetic media generated by AI become indistinguishable from reality to more than 50% of the global population within 10 years, substantially altering trust in information?
questions.why_it_matters: This would have profound societal impacts on truth, misinformation, and media consumption habits.
signals_to_watch: incidences of synthetic media influencing events
